# Bitwise operators

1.  Swap the values of two integer variables without using an additional variable.
2.  Check whether an integer is even or odd using bitwise operators.
3.  Determine the value of the bit at a specified position in an integer.
4.  Clear the value of the bit at a specified position in an integer.
5.  Invert the values of all bits in an integer.
6.  Shift the bits of an integer a specified number of positions to the left.
7.  Shift the bits of an integer a specified number of positions to the right.
8.  Determine the XOR of two integers.
